items.title: Europe's heatwave linked to 1,300 deaths, WHO says, as Germany hits record 41.7C
items.dek: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus warned that Europe is not prepared for high temperatures.
items.body: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus warned that Europe is not prepared for high temperatures.

items.title: Three firefighters die battling huge wildfires on Colorado-Utah border
items.dek: A number of blazes have been raging across Utah and Colorado, leading both governors to declare states of emergency.
